reef._comment: FRESH redeploy 2026-06-01 of the current post-Phase-3/4 contract set (internal-review must-fixes #2/#3/#6/#7 + AdapterRegistry + circuit-breaker/withdrawPool + rotatable arbiter). All contracts below Mantlescan-verified via Etherscan V2. Sepolia uses a generic MockERC20 as the index asset (real USDY/mETH live on mainnet only - see mainnetReferences). This core instance deploys identity + index(rINDEX) + AdapterRegistry + 5 reputation-weighted vaults; MockYieldAdapter, ReputationBond and Seasons are source-complete but not wired into this instance (they ship in a full/audited deploy). UNAUDITED. Previous (pre-fix) instance was AgentIdentity 0x75Ddb3Ef346C6C4995536D0368EE7C11160eddac / AgentIndex 0x9071f05834123ed4F71Ce342f1Af8e0a7077215E.

tradeableIndex.name: Reef AI Yield Index
tradeableIndex.note: The AgentIndex itself is the ERC-20 rINDEX (transfer/approve/transferFrom over index shares). Same address as reef.AgentIndex.

yieldAdapter.note: MockYieldAdapter not wired into this fresh core instance (vaults hold idle asset; NAV gains were seeded via donation+receipt). Source-complete; ships in a full/audited deploy. Prior instance used 0xAFF2Dc11Ad528bA53641A3bCcb2A441825d8b0C7.

reputationBond.note: ReputationBond (now with rotatable arbiter) not deployed in this fresh core instance. Source-complete + unit-tested; ships in a full/audited deploy. Prior instance used 0xed8d41bC0569bBe3D9EBe36022B4326FDBFFa323.

seasons.note: Phase 4 on-chain Human-vs-AI Seasons (src/Seasons.sol) source-complete + unit-tested; not deployed in this core instance.

mainnetReferences.comment: Verified addresses on Mantle MAINNET (chain 5000), pinned here for mainnet demo deployment only. Sepolia uses mocks. FBTC/USDe added 2026-06-01 for the FbtcAdapter/UsdeAdapter (on-chain-verified: symbol+decimals read from chain 5000).
